results.title: ‎Manus - AI Agent & Automation - Ratings & Reviews - App Store
results.content: Manus intentionally misrepresented its credits it gives you and says 8000 credits in a 7 day pro trial then when you sign up they only give you a 1500 credits and do not offer live support. This is bait and switch and clearly inappropriate. I wished my review could had been a positive one but there is no reason for this mistreatment and broken trust as a first impression of manus. Just because your service can do good work does not give you the right to lie to people and then screw over your customers. I still have not received any support and furthermore I was marketed to saying download our desktop app and you will use 50% burn rate of the credits you do have.. there is no way to verify I actually received any discount and I am flat out of credits before completing one website… [...] and I am flat out of credits before completing one website… customer service zero stars, free trial zero stars, desktop app is buggy and has to be shut down and rebooted with task manager repeatedly I also give that zero stars, and the marketing is full of lies and misinformation zero stars for trust and transparency. What the hell is actually going on here and how could this all be so far off from the marketed expectations you give your customers. I demand retributions for these problems I am very disappointed with my experience so far. [...] and nothing that justified the cost. My overall impression is that Manus AI is not simply flawed. It presents itself as more reliable and execution-capable than it actually is, and the result, in my experience, was a system that felt manipulative, wasteful, and exploitative. I do not recommend it. I am leaving this review because I do not want other people to confuse its confident tone with actual competence and end up burning time, money, and morale the way I did.

- Form filling: tested with a standard template

- App switching: asked it to pull data across two apps

RESULTS

- File organisation: completed in 40 seconds. Accurate.

- Form filling: 8/10 — missed one conditional field

- App switching: worked but slow on first attempt

TECHNICAL LIMITATIONS I FOUND

- Runs into issues with admin-protected folders

- Occasionally misreads overlapping UI elements

- No offline mode yet — needs internet for initial load

- Memory between sessions is limited currently

BENCHMARKS VS ALTERNATIVES

Compared to running similar tasks manually:

approximately 70-80% time saved on repetitive file

and admin tasks.

Compared to browser-based agents: faster for local

tasks, slower for web-based research tasks. [...] # Tested Manus Desktop for 72 hours — honest technical breakdown with limitations (not affiliated) : r/ArtificialInteligence

breakdown with limitations (not affiliated) : r/ArtificialInteligence

Open menu Open navigation

📊 Analysis / Opinion

I spent the last 3 days testing Manus Desktop — the

new AI agent that operates directly on your local

machine. Here's my honest technical breakdown.

WHAT IT ACTUALLY DOES

Unlike cloud-based AI tools, Manus Desktop runs an

agent loop locally — it reads your screen, interprets

your instruction, and executes actions using your

installed apps. No API calls for basic tasks.

WHAT I TESTED

- File organisation: gave it 200+ unsorted files

results.title: My Honest Manus AI Review: Can It Win Against The AI ...
results.content:
Even the most advanced model fumbles basic tasks: Manus 1.6 Max, the most powerful model on the platform, still struggles with simple procedural work. People complain about how the agent is circling, contradicting itself, and needing constant supervision on tasks that should be straightforward. [...] Imagine you ask Manus to scrape contact details from a gated industry directory and add them to your CRM. It logs in, starts pulling data, then hits a verification wall. Instead of failing silently, it flags you, you solve the CAPTCHA in thirty seconds, and it carries on. No wasted runs or lost credits.

### Manus Desktop

Manus Desktop moves the agent from the cloud to your local machine. With My Computer on the desktop, Manus can manage your local files, execute commands, and interact directly with your workspace.

It is power-user territory, but it opens up a genuinely different class of use case for developers and technical operators. Mainly, users who need the AI to run in their local environment, rather than in a remote sandbox. [...] All six steps were completed without a single failure. The task progress screen showed green checkmarks across the board.

But the result told a different story.

The app it delivered looked like it was designed in 2005. A purple-to-pink gradient background, oversized cards with emojis for icons, and a layout that felt more like a student's first HTML project than a polished product.

‍

{{templates}}

‍

The "Digital Detox" header sat under a brain emoji. The time tracking cards showed placeholder data (4.5 hours on Instagram, 6.5 hours on Gaming) with no actual tracking logic behind them.

I told Manus the UI looked dead and the karaoke feature was weak. It asked me to pick a style (modern, dark mode, or playful) and whether I wanted pop hits, classics, or both.

results.title: Troubleshooting the "My Computer" Feature Not Appearing or Connecting | Manus Help Center
results.content:
## 2. Platform Compatibility Limitations

The Manus Desktop App has specific system requirements. If your system does not meet these requirements, the app may fail to launch, crash on startup, or the "My Computer" feature may be disabled.

|  |  |  |
 --- 
| Operating System | Supported Versions | Known Unsupported Versions |
| macOS | Apple Silicon (M1, M2, M3, M4 series) | Intel-based Macs; macOS Tahoe may experience compatibility gaps |
| Windows | Windows 10, Windows 11 | Windows 7, Windows 8 |
| Linux | Not currently supported | All distributions | [...] Manus Help Center

# Troubleshooting the "My Computer" Feature Not Appearing or Connecting

Discover troubleshooting resolutions with the "My Computer" feature

Table of contents

Resolve common issues about the "My Computer" feature.

The "My Computer" feature is a powerful capability of the Manus Desktop App that allows the Manus AI agent to execute command line instructions (CLI) in your computer's terminal, enabling it to read, analyze, and edit local files, and even launch applications.

However, you might occasionally encounter issues where the feature does not appear or fails to connect properly. This guide addresses the most common troubleshooting scenarios reported by our users.

## 1. Using the Correct Application Version [...] ## 1. Using the Correct Application Version

The most common reason users cannot find the "My Computer" feature is due to using an incorrect version of the application. The feature is exclusively available in the official Manus Desktop App.

If you are using the web-based platform (manus.im) through a browser, the "My Computer" feature will not be visible. You must download and install the dedicated desktop application.

Solution: Ensure you have downloaded the official installer from . Once installed, sign into your account, click "My computer", and add the local folders you'd like Manus to work with.

## 2. Platform Compatibility Limitations
